label: Physical Agents with Physical Intelligence
title: Humanoid Intelligence
description: Humanoid robots present a new frontier for embodied intelligence. We develop integrated systems that advance navigation, manipulation, and locomotion simultaneously, enabling robots to operate robustly in complex human environments.

highlights.title: Beyondmimic: From motion tracking to versatile humanoid control via guided diffusion
highlights.description: A real-world framework to learn from human motions for versatile and naturalistic humanoid control via guided diffusion.
